text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ines Fujin has managed to leave quite a mark on
the Twinkle Series.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Together, we've successfully navigated the crucial
first three years of her career.

text_block_list.name: Footage
text_block_list.text:
Ines Fujin crosses the finish line! She's claimed
first place!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: This takes me back...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
We competed in all sorts of races together, didn't
we, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Looking back over all those races like this, I
realized something—there's a point when I
stopped collapsing as much after I finished.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
At first, I figured my body had gotten used to
holding back a little, but... honestly, I still don't
think I ever had much stamina left at the end.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: So I dunno... it's weird, right?
choice_data_list: What could be the reason behind it?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: ...Maybe everyone's cheers gave me strength.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
It was the same during the Derby. The moment I
heard those voices, it felt like my legs regained a
little strength.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I want to keep earning that same kind of support
from here on out, so—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Bzzzt... Bzzzt...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Ah, sorry. It's my manager calling.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Hello? Yes, I checked next week's shift! Okay, see
you then!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Say, Trainer. Is it okay if we go over next week's
schedule?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm more than used to having these discussions by
now. I open the schedule planner and get my
notebook ready.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
You're a lifesaver! Thank you, oh benevolent
Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Okaaay! Let's find the days I'm not working and
pack them out with training sessions!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: I'm gonna keep giving it my very best!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
That way, everyone else can keep cheering me
on!
